ksa_text: Skill in designing human oversight mechanisms for AI systems, including designing human-machine interfaces for effective oversight, specifying human-in-the-loop protocols and escalation triggers, and assigning and validating competency of oversight personnel.

dcwf.top_element_label: Skill in conducting audits or reviews of technical systems.

nist_ai_rmf.top_element_label: Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.

top_anchors.element_label: Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.
Skill in conducting audits or reviews of technical systems.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: Included: skill maps directly to Bias Auditor scope — RSK-specific signals detected ("human oversight"). STRM composite is strong (0.5825); note that framework scores routinely underweight risk management and governance vocabulary, so text-based signal carries primary weight here. Seniority is appropriate: the KSA describes practice-level execution, not enterprise strategy.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: External check: no matches in RSK job postings or cert curricula (CRISC, FRM, NIST AI RMF, CISM). Would a working Bias Auditor self-report this as required?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Challenge answered: the competency is implicit in Bias Auditor work (domain affinity 0.88, 1 RSK signal(s)). Framework vocabulary matching systematically underrepresents risk management and governance KSAs.

decision_rationale: Included: skill maps directly to Bias Auditor scope — RSK-specific signals detected ("human oversight"). Seniority is appropriate: the KSA describes practice-level execution, not enterprise strategy.
